title: i found my DREAM apartment 🔑 empty apt tour, settling in, new year routines & moving vlog
description:
Hello Friends!

HAPPY 2026 AHHHHH i hope you're all having a lovely start to the new year 🥳 and i hope your year is full of joy, good health and prosperity 🍀✨🧿

i have had such a blessed and exciting january so far .. i've moved into my dream loft apartment, i've started school again (college vlogs loading) and i'm cooking up another fun travel vlog for you guys 🤭
this week's video is a MOVE IN VLOG TO MY DREAM LOFT WOOOO!! there is an empty apartment tour, realistic move in and unpacking proces
